schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, serene desert landscape with a distant view of the city of Madinah in the background. Late afternoon sunlight casts a warm orange glow across the sandy dunes and the rocky terrain. A lone camel walks steadily in the foreground, carrying a slender rider seen from behind: medium build, with a simple white thobe and a brown woolen cloak, and a worn leather saddle bag behind him. The rider's posture conveys determination and resolve. The camel's ears are slightly raised, and the rider's hand is on the reins, guiding the camel forward. Soft warm light, vast and open mood. Wide shot from a low angle, looking up at the camel and rider. Earthy tones, sandy beige, and deep blue palette with the camel's dark brown coat as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
